nasb.text: And the dread of God was on all the kingdoms of the lands when they heard that the Lord had fought against the enemies of Israel.

esv.text: And the fear of God came on all the kingdoms of the countries when they heard that the Lord had fought against the enemies of Israel.

cnv.text: 世上列國一聽見耶和華戰敗了以色列的仇敵，就都懼怕　神。

ccb.text: 列邦列国听闻耶和华打败了以色列的敌人，都很惧怕。
